hooks.command: case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *'rm -rf /'*|*'DROP DATABASE'*|*'DROP TABLE'*|*'--force'*|*'git push -f'*|*'git push --force'*|*'git reset --hard'*|*'dotnet ef database drop'*|*'dotnet ef migrations remove'*) echo 'BLOCK: Dangerous command detected. Review before proceeding.' && exit 1 ;; esac

FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.cs) cd /sessions/dazzling-gifted-brown/mnt/running-app-org/backend && dotnet format --include "$FILE" --no-restore 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.ts|*.tsx) cd /sessions/dazzling-gifted-brown/mnt/running-app-org/frontend && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
